title: Failing path: missing input
description: A valid artifact whose runtime input path must exist. If $.input.application is missing, executeDataflow throws DATAFLOW_INPUT_REF_NOT_FOUND.

$.data.facts.application.title: Application facts

ok.title: Application is acceptable
ok.description: true when the application input passes the example mapping.

$.data.facts.application.description: Facts that require $.input.application to exist at runtime.

pipeline.title: Derive application facts
pipeline.description: Requires $.input.application to be present in process state.
